According to Simon Plant, Deputy Director for Innovation, NQCC, this initiative is vital for quantum innovation, to develop deeper understanding of various quantum computing technologies.
According to the NQCC's leadership, this initiative marks a significant step in the UK's journey towards technological innovation in quantum computing.

According to [Simon Plant](https://www.nqcc.ac.uk/leadership-team/), Deputy Director for Innovation, NQCC, this initiative is vital for quantum innovation, to develop deeper understanding of various quantum computing technologies.

interaction_phrase: we will be hosting the machines in the NQCC facilities
occurrence_sentence: The other aspect is that we will be hosting the machines in the NQCC facilities on one central campus, so in a sense, we are creating an emergent cluster of quantum machines in close proximity.
"This collaboration is expected to lead to the installation, deployment and commissioning of quantum machines, ensuring their operational readiness within the NQCC's infrastructure", said Plant.

interaction_phrase: NQCC will initially have access to the testbeds, acting as the lead user and evaluator
occurrence_sentence: However, in the medium term, the centre plans to eventually include close stakeholders in the evaluation process, subject to agreements with technology providers.
